---
name: scope-check
description: >
  Quick scope validation. Reads docs/scope-fence.md and evaluates
  whether a proposed feature is in scope, out of scope, or negotiable.
  Use before starting any new feature.
---

# Scope Check

When invoked:

1. Read `docs/scope-fence.md`.
2. Read `memory-bank/activeContext.md`.
3. Determine if the current or proposed work is in scope, out of scope, or negotiable.
4. Respond in one or two sentences. No preamble.
